news.title:
NLC India Ltd promotes Shri Pankaj Kumar to Executive Director, effective 01.04.2026.
Kumar brings 28+ years of HR expertise, including roles at LG Electronics India and NLC.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd promotes Shri Pankaj Kumar to Executive Director, effective 01.04.2026.
Kumar brings 28+ years of HR expertise, including roles at LG Electronics India and NLC.

news.title:
Experts recommend DMart, MCX, Aurobindo Pharma, Emcure Pharma, GPIL, and NLC India for short-term gains.
Nifty 50 and Sensex faced sharp declines amid elevated crude prices, rupee lows, and foreign capital outflows.
news.summary:
Experts recommend DMart, MCX, Aurobindo Pharma, Emcure Pharma, GPIL, and NLC India for short-term gains.
Nifty 50 and Sensex faced sharp declines amid elevated crude prices, rupee lows, and foreign capital outflows.

news.title:
Apollo Pipe, Aster DM, NLC India show bullish breakouts with clear buy levels, targets, and stop-loss points.
Apollo Pipe targets ₹470, Aster DM ₹730, and NLC India ₹292, supported by strong technical setups and buyer interest.
news.summary:
Apollo Pipe, Aster DM, NLC India show bullish breakouts with clear buy levels, targets, and stop-loss points.
Apollo Pipe targets ₹470, Aster DM ₹730, and NLC India ₹292, supported by strong technical setups and buyer interest.

news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: National Aluminium, NLC India, Honasa Consumer, Ather Energy, and Aurobindo Pharma.
Nifty 50 fell 2.1% to 22,819.6; Sensex dropped 2.3% to 73,583.2 amid weak sentiment and geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
NLC India's Pachwara South Coal Block has 264.8M tonnes reserve and 9M tonnes annual capacity.
Coal production begins Mar 2026, supplying 3x660MW Ghatampur Thermal Power Plant in Uttar Pradesh.
news.summary:
NLC India's Pachwara South Coal Block has 264.8M tonnes reserve and 9M tonnes annual capacity.
Coal production begins Mar 2026, supplying 3x660MW Ghatampur Thermal Power Plant in Uttar Pradesh.

news.title:
India Ratings affirms NLC India bank loans at IND AAA Stable and commercial papers at IND A1.
Non-convertible debentures rated IND AAA Stable, reflecting strong creditworthiness.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirms NLC India bank loans at IND AAA Stable and commercial papers at IND A1.
Non-convertible debentures rated IND AAA Stable, reflecting strong creditworthiness.

news.title:
NLC India Ltd received an upgraded ESG score of 61.2 by Care ESG Ratings.
The CareEdge ESG 2 rating reflects strong ESG risk management and performance.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd received an upgraded ESG score of 61.2 by Care ESG Ratings.
The CareEdge ESG 2 rating reflects strong ESG risk management and performance.

news.title:
NLC India plans ₹1.25L crore capex over 4-5 years for capacity expansion.
A renewable energy IPO with 25-30% stake dilution is targeted by Sep-Oct 2026.
news.summary:
NLC India plans ₹1.25L crore capex over 4-5 years for capacity expansion.
A renewable energy IPO with 25-30% stake dilution is targeted by Sep-Oct 2026.

news.title:
Infomerics reaffirmed NLC India Ltd's long-term bank facility rating at IVR AAA.
The stable outlook highlights NLC India Ltd's strong credit profile.
news.summary:
Infomerics reaffirmed NLC India Ltd's long-term bank facility rating at IVR AAA.
The stable outlook highlights NLC India Ltd's strong credit profile.

news.title:
Acuite Ratings assigns ACUITE AAA Stable for NLC India's ₹1000 Cr ECB.
Reaffirms ACUITE AAA Stable for ₹950 Cr Term Loan, showing strong creditworthiness.
news.summary:
Acuite Ratings assigns ACUITE AAA Stable for NLC India's ₹1000 Cr ECB.
Reaffirms ACUITE AAA Stable for ₹950 Cr Term Loan, showing strong creditworthiness.

news.title:
NLC India Ltd revised its Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results after correcting a signature issue in the Limited Review Report.
For Q3 FY25, NLC India reported standalone revenue of ₹2,885.08 crore and a net profit of ₹427.92 crore.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd revised its Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results after correcting a signature issue in the Limited Review Report.
For Q3 FY25, NLC India reported standalone revenue of ₹2,885.08 crore and a net profit of ₹427.92 crore.

news.title: ICRA reaffirms NLC India's ₹2000 Cr NCD rating at AAA Stable, indicating strong credit quality.
news.summary: ICRA reaffirms NLC India's ₹2000 Cr NCD rating at AAA Stable, indicating strong credit quality.

news.title:
NLC India's ESG rating of 59 (Adequate) was reaffirmed by ICRA ESG Ratings Ltd.
NSE Sustainability Ratings assigned NLC India an ESG score of 55 (Average) for FY25.
news.summary:
NLC India's ESG rating of 59 (Adequate) was reaffirmed by ICRA ESG Ratings Ltd.
NSE Sustainability Ratings assigned NLC India an ESG score of 55 (Average) for FY25.

news.title:
NLC India Ltd paid an interim dividend of ₹360 crore to the Coal Ministry for FY 2025-26.
CMD Prasanna Kumar Motupalli presented the cheque to the Central government.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd paid an interim dividend of ₹360 crore to the Coal Ministry for FY 2025-26.
CMD Prasanna Kumar Motupalli presented the cheque to the Central government.

news.title:
CAG reports NLC India incurred ₹2,354 cr loss due to design flaws in thermal power stations.
The loss is attributed to under-recovery of capacity charges in NLCIL's power plants.
news.summary:
CAG reports NLC India incurred ₹2,354 cr loss due to design flaws in thermal power stations.
The loss is attributed to under-recovery of capacity charges in NLCIL's power plants.

news.title:
NLC India Ltd redeemed Rs. 500 Cr commercial papers on 16.02.2026.
The commercial papers were listed on BSE under scrip code 513683.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd redeemed Rs. 500 Cr commercial papers on 16.02.2026.
The commercial papers were listed on BSE under scrip code 513683.

news.title:
NLC India Ltd released its 10 Feb 2026 investor call transcript.
Transcript covers Q3 earnings discussion, aiding understanding of outlook and performance.
news.summary:
NLC India Ltd released its 10 Feb 2026 investor call transcript.
Transcript covers Q3 earnings discussion, aiding understanding of outlook and performance.

news.title:
NLC India signs MoU with NALCO for energy collaboration.
Jharkhand government demands ₹929 crore compensation from Hind Copper.
news.summary:
NLC India signs MoU with NALCO for energy collaboration.
Jharkhand government demands ₹929 crore compensation from Hind Copper.

news.title:
NLC India plans to add 650 MW of solar capacity this year.
This expansion will raise its total RE capacity beyond 2 GW by March.
news.summary:
NLC India plans to add 650 MW of solar capacity this year.
This expansion will raise its total RE capacity beyond 2 GW by March.

news.title:
NLC India signs MoU with another Navratna CPSE for a 1200 MW thermal power project.
The partnership focuses on cost-effective, reliable, and sustainable power with joint projects and coal supply.
news.summary:
NLC India signs MoU with another Navratna CPSE for a 1200 MW thermal power project.
The partnership focuses on cost-effective, reliable, and sustainable power with joint projects and coal supply.
